Home / Services / Fence Repair & Installation

Fence Repair & Installation

Secure your property with expert fence repair and installation services.

A well-maintained fence not only enhances the curb appeal of your home but also provides security and privacy. Northwest Pride Handyman Services offers comprehensive fence repair and installation services to meet your needs. We handle everything from repairing damaged sections of existing fences to installing new fences from scratch.

Our fence repair process begins with a thorough inspection of your fence. We identify any areas of damage, such as broken posts, loose boards, or leaning sections. We then carefully repair or replace the damaged components, using high-quality materials to ensure a lasting repair.

If you're looking to install a new fence, we can help you choose the right style and materials to match your needs and budget. We offer a wide range of fencing options, including wood, vinyl, and chain-link. We handle all aspects of the installation process, from obtaining permits to digging post holes to erecting the fence. We are familiar with Seattle's property line regulations and neighborhood aesthetics.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Inspect the fence for damage and identify areas of concern.
  2. 02 Step 2: Repair or replace damaged components.
  3. 03 Step 3: Install new fences according to your specifications.
  4. 04 Step 4: Ensure compliance with local regulations.

Benefits

  • Enhances security and privacy
  • Improves curb appeal
  • Defines property lines
  • Increases property value

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of fence is best for my property?

The best type of fence depends on your needs and budget. We can help you choose the right fence for your property.

Do I need a permit to install a fence?

In most cases, you will need a permit to install a fence. We can help you obtain the necessary permits.

How long does it take to install a fence?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project. We can provide you with an estimated timeline.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence repair & installation? Contact us today.
